use serde::Serialize;

#[derive(Serialize)]
struct MetricsReport {
    cpu_usage: f64,
    memory_mb: u64,
    request_count: u64,
}

fn emit_batch_reports(reports: &[MetricsReport]) {
    for report in reports {
        let json = serde_json::to_string(report).unwrap();
        send_to_collector(&json);
    }
}

fn format_for_display(data: &serde_json::Value) -> String {
    serde_json::to_string_pretty(data).unwrap()
}

fn send_to_collector(_s: &str) {}

fn main() {
    let reports = vec![
        MetricsReport { cpu_usage: 0.5, memory_mb: 512, request_count: 1000 },
    ];
    emit_batch_reports(&reports);
    let val = serde_json::json!({"hello": "world"});
    println!("{}", format_for_display(&val));
}
